identity.name: Bharti Mobile Collection (BMC)
identity.description: A high-end billing and management system for a premium mobile accessory and repair shop.

gradients.gold_border: border border-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-[#D4AF37] to-[#F3E5AB] bg-origin-border

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#b5952f] font-semibold shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-700 hover:border-zinc-600 transition-all

cards.default: bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-zinc-800/50 shadow-sm hover:border-[#D4AF37]/30 transition-colors duration-300
cards.highlight: bg-gradient-to-br from-zinc-900 to-black border border-[#D4AF37]/50 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.1)]

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 text-white focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] placeholder:text-zinc-600

status_badges.success: bg-green-500/10 text-green-500 border border-green-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium
status_badges.warning: bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-500 border border-yellow-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium
status_badges.error: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium
status_badges.pending: bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-500 border border-blue-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure Gold (#D4AF37) text is only used on very dark backgrounds or use darker gold for light backgrounds. Prefer Gold for borders/icons rather than main body text.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings using Gold (#D4AF37) are mandatory for keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly enforce Dark Mode. Do not build a Light Mode toggle unless explicitly requested later.
Use 'Manrope' font for all Headings (H1-H4) and numbers (prices, totals). Use 'Inter' for labels and body text.
The 'Billing' page must be keyboard optimized. Focus should land on the product search input automatically.
Invoice generation: The on-screen invoice should look 'Dark', but the PDF export must be 'White' background with Black text to save printer ink.
Use 'sonner' for all success/error notifications (e.g., 'Bill Saved', 'Stock Low').
For the Dashboard, use the 'Bento Grid' layout defined in 'grid_strategies'.
Repair status tracking is critical. Use clear color-coded badges.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are present on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards).
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop' - do not use generic centered layouts.
Use 2-3x more padding than standard Tailwind utilities (e.g., p-8 instead of p-4).
Micro-interactions: Buttons should scale down slightly on click (active:scale-95). Cards should lift on hover.
No generic gradients. Use the defined 'gold_text' or 'gold_border' classes.
Never use 'transparent' backgrounds for dropdowns or modals - they must have a solid or blurred background to be readable.
